tasks.subject: Task 1: Add MCP SDK Dependency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` as an explicit dependency of `packages/api`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/api/package.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` appears in `packages/api/package.json` dependencies
- [ ] `pnpm install` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm -r build` succeeds

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @jigit/api build` exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/package.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jigit/api build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["@modelcontextprotocol/sdk in package.json", "pnpm install succeeds", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Write Failing MCP Protocol Tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write the test file that will drive the MCP protocol implementation. Tests will fail until the controller is rewritten.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.controller.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Test file imports MCP SDK types
- [ ] `tools/list` test sends real MCP JSON-RPC and asserts `activate-jira` appears
- [ ] `tools/call` success test sends real MCP envelope and asserts `CallToolResult` shape
- [ ] `tools/call` error tests assert `isError: true` (not HTTP 404/409)
- [ ] Existing auth/header guard tests preserved
- [ ] Tests fail as expected (implementation not done yet)

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @jigit/api test -- session-mcp.controller.test.ts` shows FAIL lines

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.controller.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jigit/api test -- session-mcp.controller.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -E '(FAIL|PASS)' | head -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tools/list test exists", "tools/call tests exist", "error tests check isError:true", "auth guard tests preserved", "tests currently fail"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create MCP Server Factory
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `session-mcp.server.ts` with a tool registry and the `activate-jira` handler that catches business errors and wraps them as MCP error results.

**Files:**
- Create: `packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.server.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Exports `createSessionMcpServer(ctx: { username: string; service: SessionMcpService }): McpServer`
- [ ] Registers `activate-jira` tool with Zod input schema
- [ ] Handler catches `NotFoundException`/`ConflictException` and returns `{ isError: true, content: [...] }`
- [ ] Success returns `{ content: [{type:"text", text: JSON.stringify(result)}] }`
- [ ] TypeScript compiles clean

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @jigit/api build` exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jigit/api build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createSessionMcpServer exported", "activate-jira tool registered", "error handling wraps as isError:true", "build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Rewrite Controller to Use MCP Transport
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite `session-mcp.controller.ts` to delegate to the MCP server + `StreamableHTTPServerTransport`, using Fastify's raw req/res.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.controller.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Controller keeps `@UseGuards(AuthGuard)` and `x-git-username` header check
- [ ] POST handler builds fresh `McpServer` via factory + stateless transport
- [ ] Calls `transport.handleRequest(request.raw, reply.raw, request.body)`
- [ ] Closes transport/server after response
- [ ] All MCP protocol tests pass

**Verify:** `pnpm --filter @jigit/api test -- session-mcp.controller.test.ts` shows all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/api/src/session-mcp/session-mcp.controller.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @jigit/api test -- session-mcp.controller.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AuthGuard preserved", "x-git-username check preserved", "MCP transport delegation works", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Verify End-to-End with Claude Code MCP Client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Manually verify the endpoint works when configured as an MCP server in Claude Code.

**Files:**
- None (manual verification)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm dev:api` starts the API successfully
- [ ] Claude Code's MCP connection shows connected status
- [ ] `tools/list` returns `activate-jira` (visible in Claude Code if applicable)
- [ ] `tools/call activate-jira` succeeds from Claude Code

**Verify:** Manual — Claude Code shows "jagit-session: connected" or equivalent

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["API starts", "MCP connection green", "tool callable"]}
```
